role_title: Senior Programs and Business Operations Lead, Monthly Stays

location.office_time_required: occasional work at an Airbnb office or attendance at offsites, as agreed to with your manager

level_signals: 15+ years experience in strategic roles, consulting, sales leadership or scaling global businesses
Works with Homes Leadership to develop and execute strategies

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: 15+ years experience in strategic roles, consulting, sales leadership or scaling global businesses
Experience working cross-functionally with product, marketing, sales operations and enablement teams
Ability to take initiative and deal with uncertainties
Ability to manage complex projects and multi-task with excellent organization skills.
Pays attention to both details and macro-level outcomes
Seasoned internal and external communicator with strong interpersonal skills
Ability to thrive in a fast-paced, dynamic and ever changing startup environment
Ability to flourish with minimal guidance, be proactive, and handle uncertainty and ambiguity.
Data driven, can do attitude, strategic thinker and passion for new products and solutions.
Strong verbal and written communication skills

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Strong appetite for working with the Airbnb community

scope.surface: Monthly Stays global offering — supply growth, host success, in-market strategy, international expansion
primary_metrics_inferred: Business performance across countries (strength/weakness deep dives)
core_responsibilities: Drive annual strategy & planning process, including determining business upside and resources needed to deliver that
Build tools and equip teams with the relevant data support to tools to make actionable decisions
Develop actionable business analysis - enable functional leads to provide consistent information to their teams and stakeholders
Assist to leadership inquiries, providing data driven insights driven insights quickly and accurately by leveraging tools such as SQL, excel and Tableau
Manage a handful analysts to support local and regional partners with insights and decision making capabilities
Create materials to communicate strategy and business performance to key stakeholders
Liaise with functional teams (comms, marketing) to provide business recommendation and inform functional priorities and initiatives
Assist ongoing projects with progress tracking and measurement capabilities such as performance dashboards
Work with FP&A and Advanced Analytics to assess business performance (across multiple forums) and deep dive into areas of strength and weakness of the countries
Incubate / run special projects that can be proven and handed off for scaling

compensation.equity_form: equity mentioned as possible component alongside bonus and Employee Travel Credits

green_flags: Compensation range disclosed and competitive ($200K-$247K base)
Remote-US eligible role with flexibility agreed with manager
Equity, bonus, and Employee Travel Credits mentioned as additional comp components
Clear scope tied to a specific product area (Monthly Stays) within a well-known global company
People management responsibility (analysts) signals real organizational authority
red_flags: 15+ years minimum experience is a high bar that excludes most mid-career candidates
Visa sponsorship status is unclear — work authorization only inferred from state-restriction language
JD contains duplicated phrase 'data driven insights driven insights' suggesting copy-editing gaps
Role scope spans strategy, operations, analytics, people management, and stakeholder comms — very broad remit that may indicate under-defined ownership
